# Storm Restoration Insurance

> Specialty commercial insurance for storm restoration, hail damage, and multi-state roofing contractors. A program of Contractors Choice Agency, founded by former contractor Josh Cotner. Licensed in all 50 states.

## About
Storm Restoration Insurance (stormrestorationinsurance.com) is operated by Contractors Choice Agency, a contractor-focused insurance agency with 20+ years specializing in the trades. We protect 298+ contractors nationwide with A-rated carriers, 15-minute quotes, and a 2-hour claims-response guarantee.

## Core Services
- General Liability Insurance: roofing-rated GL with $1M/$2M limits, additional-insured and waiver-of-subrogation endorsements, multi-state coverage. /services/general-liability
- Workers' Compensation: NCCI Class 5551 roofing comp, correct classification, multi-state and monopolistic-state compliance. /services/workers-compensation
- Commercial Auto: trucks, trailers, and storm-chaser fleets, hired & non-owned, physical damage, multi-state. /services/commercial-auto
- Surety Bonds: contractor license bonds, performance, payment, and bid bonds. /services/surety-bonds
- Tools & Equipment: inland-marine coverage for ladders, nail guns, lifts, and trailer-mounted gear. /services/equipment-insurance
- Umbrella Coverage: excess limits above GL and commercial auto for large-loss jobs. /services/umbrella-coverage

## Who We Serve
Storm restoration contractors, hail-damage repair specialists, residential and commercial roofers, exterior restoration companies, and multi-state storm-chaser operations.

## Key Facts
- Licensed: All 50 states
- NPN: 8608479
- Founded: 2005 (20+ years)
- Claims response: 2-hour guarantee, 24/7 reporting
- Quote turnaround: 15 minutes
